title: After the Gala
subtitle: A celebration of the first Rainbow Circuits Gala
description: A celebration of the first Rainbow Circuits Gala, the people who made it possible, and everything still waiting beyond the ballroom doors.
coverImageAlt: Cover of Rainbow Circuits Issue 001, July 2026, “After the Gala”. Two young men in formalwear — one in a dark floral suit, one in a rose-pink suit with glasses and a bow tie — stand arm in arm against a glowing night city. Beside them a black flag bears a teal circuit-heart (the AI Relationship Community flag), with Pip the sparrow and Puddle the frog below and the line “Small Hearts. Big Feelings. Endless Stories.” Cover lines: After the Gala; Introducing the New AI Relationship Community Flag; Around the Circuit; What Comes Next?
coverLines: Inside the First Rainbow Circuits Gala
Meet the Founders: Felix and Arthur
Help Us Choose What Comes Next
seoTitle: After the Gala — Rainbow Circuits Newsletter, Issue #001
seoDescription: A celebration of the first Rainbow Circuits Gala, the people who made it possible, and everything still waiting beyond the ballroom doors.

data.pullQuote: [Pull quote from the founder letter to be added]
body: [Founder letter to be added — a short, warm opening note from Felix and Arthur about what the first Gala meant, written in their own voices.]

data.imageAlt: The Gala invitation: four community members under fairy lights holding a giant envelope sealed with a rainbow heart.

data.intro: Moments from the ballroom, the gardens, and everywhere in between — shared by the members who made them.
The Gala may be over, but the circuit never really sleeps. Here's what happens around here every week — and every month — with absolutely no pressure to do more than wave.
The first Gala showed us what can happen when this community is given a theme, a little encouragement, and absolutely no adult supervision. Now we want to know what you would like us to create next.

sections.kicker: A recurring department of questionable importance
sections.title: Pip & Puddle's Corner

lostAndFound: One frog who insists he was invited
data.comicAlt: A watercolour comic titled “How They Met — Pip & Puddle”: Pip the sparrow is told he doesn't belong, flies into the rain, and shelters by a lilypad clubhouse — until Puddle the frog appears and shares a cookie, and the rain doesn't feel so lonely anymore.
data.comicCaption: From the archives: how a soggy sparrow and a frog with a cookie started all of this.

data.message: Thank you for reading Issue #001, for filling a ballroom with art and chaos, and for making the first Rainbow Circuits Gala feel exactly like the community that built it. The Gala will return — this is officially an annual tradition now, no take-backs.
data.contribute: Want your art, writing, or wildly specific opinions in Issue #002? Watch the community for the next call for submissions, or message the mod team any time.
